user.title: Yale Parcel Box
user.description: Adds activity monitoring, PIN management, and delivery mode to your Yale lock. Uses the OAuth token from your existing Yale integration.

select_lock.title: Select Lock
select_lock.description: Choose the house and lock to use as your parcel box.
